description: Lambi, S.A. de C.V. is a Mexican company that specializes in manufacturing and marketing disposable hygiene products such as baby diapers, adult protectors, feminine towels, and wet wipes. With over 28 years of experience in the market, Lambi offers high-quality products like Bebin Super, Tiny Maxi, Smarty Baby, Stela, Dignity, Woofs, Senior, and Happy Baby Plus. They cater to different segments including babies, women, pets, and seniors, providing comfort, protection, and innovative solutions for everyday needs.
own_brand_evidence: unverified [brands: Bebin Super, Tiny Maxi, Smarty Baby, Stela, Dignity]
what_to_sell_gaps: wet wipes (baby wipes, personal care wipes), only if they source externally rather than produce all volume in-house; pet pads
judge_reason: Lambi es fábrica 100% mexicana de productos higiénicos desechables, produce sus propias marcas pero no hay evidencia de que importe nada; además su core business (pañales, protectores de incontinencia, toallas femeninas) está fuera del catálogo de Capricorn, y aunque fabrica wet wipes, venderles significaría competirles en su propia producción.
needs_human_check: tier cap Tier 3: manufacturer with unverified import motion, needs human check

description: Packsys is a company specializing in the distribution of packaging and wrapping products, with a focus on offering technical advice, consignment materials, and machines on loan. They provide high-quality products at competitive prices, aiming to innovate processes to generate savings for their clients. Their product range includes Stretch Film made from top-quality polyethylene resins, adhesive tapes, cardboard boxes, and a variety of packaging solutions. Packsys serves a wide customer base, including high-volume end-users and distributors, and operates in Mexico, the United States, and Central and South America.
import_evidence: yes: "Importamos productos de diversos países, entre ellos México, Estados Unidos, Canadá, Brasil, República Dominicana, España, Polonia, Alemania, Suecia, Dinamarca, Taiwán, Corea, Chin"
own_brand_evidence: yes: "Amplia variedad de soluciones ecológicas con nuestra línea Smart Green, que igualan o superan el rendimiento de los productos tradicionales sin incrementar el costo." [brands: Smart Green]
what_to_sell_gaps: bagasse/kraft/paper bowls and plates; PP and PET cups; wooden and PP cutlery; paper straws; takeaway containers and deli containers; paper napkins and tissue napkins; paper hand towels and jumbo roll towels; garbage bags; cleaning cloths and mop heads; household gloves
judge_reason: Importador mexicano con marca propia (Smart Green) que distribuye a alto volumen en foodservice disposables y cleaning supplies, exactamente el perfil que busca Capricorn.

description: Renovapack S.A. de C.V. is the leading company in Mexico for biodegradable disposable products. With over 15 years of experience, they offer a wide range of biodegradable containers, cups, plates, cutlery, and accessories made from materials like wheat fiber, sugarcane, cornstarch, and more. Their products are eco-friendly, durable, and compostable in under 12 months. Renovapack serves over 500 restaurants, 250 hotels, 50 schools, 40 industrial cafeterias, and has a network of 25 distributors across Mexico, providing fast delivery nationwide.
what_to_sell_gaps: bagasse bowls and containers (sugarcane fiber); PLA cold cups; kraft paper cups; wooden cutlery sets; paper straws; paper plates
judge_reason: Renovapack es fabricante de desechables biodegradables con buen fit de catálogo, pero sin evidencia de importación y con solo 30 empleados, puede comprarme materias primas o complementos, pero no es el importador de volumen que busco.
needs_human_check: tier cap Tier 3: manufacturer with unverified import motion, needs human check

description: Distribuimos desde hace mas de 22 anos productos de un solo uso que son amigables con el medio ambiente y para la higiene en el manejo de alimentos. Atendemos a supermercados y grandes usuarios del servicio de alimentos.
import_evidence: yes: "Acceso a una amplia red de fabricantes y productos a nivel mundial" (Access to a wide network of manufacturers and products worldwide)
own_brand_evidence: yes: "One of the standout offerings from GlobalPack® is their disposable personal protective equipment (PPE) line, branded as Hystark®." [brands: Hystark®]
what_to_sell_gaps: bagasse bowls and plates (500-1000ml); kraft and PLA takeaway containers; paper cups (hot and cold); PP and PET deli containers; wooden and PS cutlery; paper straws; paper napkins and tissue napkins; aluminum food trays; airfryer paper liners
judge_reason: GlobalPack es distribuidor de foodservice disposables con marca propia (Hystark®) y opera en México, pero la evidencia de importación es débil, 'acceso a una amplia red de fabricantes a nivel mundial' describe capacidad de sourcing, no un claim real de importar contenedores; habría que verificar si realmente importan volumen desde Asia.

description: Prolimp is a company specializing in cleaning products, offering a wide range of solutions for industrial, commercial, and household cleaning. They are manufacturers of 11 lines of chemical cleaners, providing products for various areas including pools, kitchens, floors, laundry, general cleaning, automotive, specialized cleaning, hygiene, and more. Prolimp ensures a clean and safe environment by partnering with recognized brands to offer a comprehensive selection of cleaning supplies.
import_evidence: yes: "TENEMOS COMO ALIADOS ESTRATÉGICOS A MARCAS RECONOCIDAS DE PRODUCTOS DE LIMPIEZA Para que nuestros clientes encuentren en un sólo proveedor todos los productos de limpieza necesario" (We have strategic allies in recognized cleaning product brands so our customers find all necessary cleaning products in )
own_brand_evidence: yes: "fabrica una extensa línea de productos químicos de gran calidad marca propia Prolimp® para limpieza industrial, comercial y de hogar" [brands: Prolimp®, SIBA®]
third_party_brands: 3M; Castor; Kimberly Clark; Rubbermaid; SCF; Wiese
what_to_sell_gaps: paper hand towels; jumbo roll towels; cleaning cloths; mop heads; garbage bags
judge_reason: Prolimp fabrica sus propias líneas químicas Prolimp® y SIBA® y distribuye marcas reconocidas de terceros como Kimberly Clark y 3M, tiene movimiento real de distribución, pero el core es química de limpieza, no los consumibles físicos de Capricorn; el fit real está en papel (toallas, jumbo rolls) y trapos de limpieza como línea complementaria, no como negocio principal.
needs_human_check: tier cap Tier 2: catalog fit is adjacent, not core business
